result.stderr:
UnitySentinel 0.1.1+9.Branch.main.Sha.a922ffe2ad886b7747e5f3ee3c55c08ec6e1f0de
Copyright (C) 2026 UnitySentinel

  --unitypath         The path to the Unity editor executable. The tool will try
                      to find the executable automatically in the default
                      install location based on the last Unity version the
                      project was opened with.

  --projectpath       The path to the Unity project. If you are executing the
                      tool in the project directory, you don't need to specify
                      this.

  --testmode          (Default: PlayMode) Run play-mode or edit-mode tests.
                      Specify as PlayMode or EditMode.

  --watchpaths        Specify additional paths outside of the project Asset
                      folder to watch for changes, separated by a semi-colon.

  --assemblynames     A semicolon-separated list of test assemblies to test

  --testnames         A semicolon-separated list of test names to run, or a
                      regular expression pattern to match tests by their full
                      name.

  --testcategories    A semicolon-separated list of test categories to include
                      in the run.

  --help              Display this help screen.

  --version           Display version information.
